mobility_management.description: Access Services operates a Mobility Management referral service that matches individuals' transportation needs with available options. Provides quick, accurate referrals to over 200 public and private accessible transportation providers in Los Angeles County.
mobility_management.hours: Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM

neighboring_county_paratransit.description: ADA paratransit services in counties bordering Los Angeles County. Access riders can use these services as visitors for up to 21 days per calendar year. Call Access at 800-827-0829 at least two days in advance to transfer eligibility.

locations.address: 1700 W. Fifth Street, San Bernardino, CA 92411

services.name: VISTA (Ventura Intercity Service Transit Authority)
services.address: 950 County Square Drive, Suite 207, Ventura, CA 93003

services.name: Thousand Oaks ADA Paratransit
services.address: 2100 Thousand Oaks Boulevard, Thousand Oaks, CA 91362

designated_stands.description: Access Services operates 47 designated pick-up and drop-off stands at popular locations, similar to bus stops. These are pre-set locations along common routes where riders can be picked up or dropped off.
designated_stands.how_to_use: When making a reservation, you can specify a designated stand as your pick-up or drop-off point. The reservationist can help you identify the nearest stand.

medical_facilities: Rancho Los Amigos National Rehabilitation Center
other_locations: Various community centers and colleges throughout LA County

designated_stands.note: Full interactive directory available at accessla.org under Stand Directory. Riders can search by facility name.

regional_fixed_route_agencies.description: Fixed-route (bus and rail) agencies within Los Angeles County. Access riders can use most of these for free through the Free Fare Program.
regional_fixed_route_agencies.note: For specific route and schedule information, contact Metro at 323-466-3876 or the individual agency. Access Mobility Management at 800-431-7882 can help match you with the right service.

metro_micro.description: Metro Micro is an on-demand shared rideshare service operated by Metro. It is a newer service available in select zones throughout LA County.
metro_micro.note: Check with Metro for current service zones and availability.
